title: Loop Health
description: dev-loop pipeline health: success rate, lead time, gate failures

panels.title: Issues Processed (24h)
panels.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT trace_id) as total FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 HOURS'

panels.title: Success Rate
panels.query: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN gates_first_failure IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as success_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'gates.run_all' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS'

panels.title: Average Lead Time (seconds)
panels.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration / 1000000), 1) as avg_lead_time_s FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS'

panels.title: Gate Failure Breakdown
panels.query: SELECT gates_first_failure as gate, COUNT(*) as failures FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'gates.run_all' AND gates_first_failure IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' GROUP BY gate ORDER BY failures DESC

panels.title: Pipeline Runs Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', _timestamp) as hour, COUNT(*) as runs FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

panels.title: Retry Rate
panels.query: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN operation_name = 'feedback.retry' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) as retry_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND _timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS'
